overview.description: AI-powered talent sourcing that automatically scans the internet to find and pre-screen the best candidates
overview.description_long: Quido automatically searches the internet for the best talent, sourcing and pre-presenting candidates to employers. The platform targets enterprise and SME customers with a B2B SaaS model, promising lower time-to-hire, better targeting of top talent, and always-current candidate data. The product combines AI agents with ready-made SaaS tools for recruitment workflows.
overview.tagline: Lower time-to-hire, target the best talent, always up-to-date data

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: AI talent sourcing is rapidly being commoditized — LinkedIn, ChatGPT plugins, and a wave of well-funded competitors (Fetcher, SeekOut, Gem) offer equivalent web-scraping and candidate matching. Quido's value proposition of 'automatically searching the internet for talent' can be replicated with general-purpose LLMs and search APIs with minimal differentiation.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: HR tech and AI recruiting is a proven, large market with real demand, but is extremely crowded. Quido enters a space dominated by LinkedIn Recruiter, established AI sourcing tools, and entrenched ATS vendors adding AI features. Market exists but differentiation will be very hard.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No public funding information found. Website (getquido.com) is not resolving, suggesting the company is either pre-launch or very early stage. Only a single contact email is available, indicating a tiny founding team with no visible runway.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: The combination of a highly commoditized product category, no visible funding or traction, and a non-resolving website indicate very high risk. Quido would need strong proprietary data assets or enterprise integrations to carve out a durable position in this saturated market.

metadata.notes: Website getquido.com does not resolve (DNS failure). Company appears very early-stage or pre-launch. Only data source is CNAIP listing. Contact person is 'Samuel' (samuel@getquido.com), likely a founder. Address is Karlín, Praha. Note: quido.ai is a separate Italian company (QUIDO SRL) for PE/M&A — not this company.
